entry.title: Re: Field Masking - Context based masking scenario in SE16 and BP transaction
entry.content: Great article, Amit.  Does this custom solution still work with SAP S/4HANA MASKING 2011 FP05?  Or, is there any standard solution?  Thanks in advance for your assistance.

entry.title: Need .pem client certificate for CPI integration with other systems
Sales scheduling agreement - fiscal year change settings
entry.content:
I am currently working on a case where the fiscal year change within sales scheduling agreements creates some issues/uncertainties. It seems like the system is resetting cumulative quantities automatically at year end. Some of their customers also do not reset cumulative quantities at year end/fiscal year change. 

Where can I find the settings regarding the fiscal year change within sales scheduling agreements? 

Is it possible, for some of the agreements, to never reset the cumulative quantities?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Inventory Stock Reversal in SAP: Best Practices for O...
entry.content: @kenjon Please find the following link https://me.sap.com/notes/722980

entry.title: Re: Optimizing Tactical Sourcing: Maximizing Benefits from this Guided Buying Channel
entry.content: Great blog Jorge!!

entry.title: Re: MIGO ERROR: The system could not create any outputs
entry.content: Did you already check your Customizing (output and movement code) as well as any BAdI/Customer-Exit implementation?

entry.title: SAP Academic Community Conference Spain 2024
entry.content:
Dr. Rafael Monterde, SAP Academic Board Iberoamerica - Chair, opened the event jointly with Dr. Holger Wittges, Executive Director from SAP University Competence Center Technical University Munich, jointly with SAP University Alliances now newly duo for Spain Dr. Igor Belousov & María Calzada de Neumann.  

The event started with a Keynote on Sustainability from Carlos Diaz, Chief Sustainability Officer, SVP EMEA South, who challenged the participants with some maths about the impact on the flights on immense carbon footprint, how much of carbon dioxide a tree absorbs in average per year, and that it is difficult to compensate the impact without implementation of sustainable solutions, including ones from SAP.

 

Ana Encinas, General Director of AUSAPE, from the Association of Users of SAP Spain, presented their  employability portal to the academics followed by a trio session from SAP Partners, represented as follows, by Alejandro Victoria, Director Business Unit Industry Solutions & Retail from Inetum, Jaime García, Consultant Director of SAP, Downtown area from Seidor and last but not least Alfonso Gippini, Executive Director - Technology Consulting from EY. The SAP Partners spoke on the importance of having talent in SAP, the urgence and huge gap of talents with SAP practical knowledge and further synergies with the academic ecosystem. The sessions were also very interactive and were followed by an open exchange of feedback between the presenters and the audience for a win-win situation, like platforms for self-learning, certifications, SAP next-gen projects for students on SAP-related challenges offered by customers/ partners, among others. 

Last but not least we also counted with a quick concise and comprehensive session on SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) from Alberto Sierra Pantoja, BTP Solution Advisor Expert from the Center of Excellence at SAP, presenting customer and their projects in App Dev, Automation, Integration, Data & Analytics, and AI. Moreover, Dr. Holger Wittges on new curricula on SAP University Alliances like SAP Signavio, Digital Transformation Curricula on GBI with Bike sharing, BTP, among others. 

It has become quite clear that the SAP University Alliances Community in Spain values and makes the most of such presential events with the local ecosystem.

Among the free academic resources shared, we can mention the following: 

1. Student Zone: Free Learning Journeys for Students | SAP Learning > Free materials for self-learning. Many academics request their students to get the badge of completion of the course and complement their classes with UCC hosting services 

2. CERS01: Certification voucher in the cloud for students and professors for 1 attempt: CERS01 - SAP Certification Exam, One Attempt for Students | SAP Training

3. One-pagers regarding curriculum summary, benefits, etc. including a testimony from a Professor from SAP University Alliances: 

  • SAP Integrated Business Planning (SCM) – New generation of advanced supply chain planning: Strategy update process (sap.com) More information about study cases: Layout (ovgu.de)
  • SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC): Strategy update process (sap.com) More information about study cases: Layout (ovgu.de)
  • SAP Datasphere: Strategy update process (sap.com) More information about study cases: SAP DWC (ovgu.de)
  • SAP Signavio (BPM): Strategy update process (sap.com) 

    4. Quick start guides, per SAP solution, with learning pathways, customer cases, benefits, why to learn that solution, etc.: Quick Start Guides on SAP Cloud Solutions for Facu... - SAP Community

    For further questions send us an email to m.calzada.de.neumann@sap.com & igor.belousov@sap.com 

ACC ES 2025 - Groupal pic

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano I

This looks like a great initiative and I will love to be a part of it, 

I Identify as a person in the below categories:

  • Minorities who may not have equal opportunity in their geographic location.
  • First generation college student.

Currently working in a environment that's using SAP and would love to learn and develop more my skill set further.

Thank You

entry.title: Re: SAP Document and Reporting Compliance for Peppol e-Invoices Singapore - Part 2
entry.content:
@DerekVersola 

SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, cloud edition is mainly a solution for electronic documents on Peppol network, the license could be expand for other business scenario in future.

SAP Document and Reporting Compliance for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, private edition - this is solution for statutory reporting and electronic document - not on Peppol network.

Please check this blog SAP Document and Reporting Compliance: Cloud or On-Premise? Not an “either or” option, but a streamlined solution for electronic compliance!

entry.title: Re: How to import internal table from the file in the Ecl...
entry.content:
Hi Praveen,

unfortunately this feature is not supported in ADT yet.

Best regards,
Armin

entry.title: Hi team,I have a question regarding Scope Item 2YM: do we need MBC or Cash Management to sell it?
entry.content:
Hi team,

I have a question regarding Scope Item 2YM: do we need MBC or Cash Management to sell it?

 

we have an S/4 Public cloud deal and we need to know if we need to position MBC or Cash Management (DDA says it but it doesn't appear in the list of scope items).

 

Thanks !

entry.title: Re: SAP Gateway Project Extn/Redefinition - Issue with call to extension
entry.content:
1. you have to register the service

2.you have to create ui extension project to update the service model to use the extended odata service.

entry.title: How does one allow with hierarchy level selection on transaction CJ8G
entry.content:
Hello

In CJ88 for settlements we have with hierarchy selection but need the same in CJ8G as we are running it in back ground (CJ8g) and only want it to settle for the WBS chosen not the whole hierarchy. In CJ88 it allows you to unselect with hierarchy and we  want the same for CJ8G. CJ8G always runs with hierarchy switched on which is not what we want as it settle all the lower WBS.  I have checked the variant options for CJ8G and it  does not have any options for hierarchy level nor do the dynamic selections have such an option.   Has anyone had this problem and what did you do to solve it?

entry.title: DISTINCT function shows blank preview results. But, at the bottom it shows the num of results
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am using DISTINCT function to get the unique Course ID's from PA_CPNT_EVTHST table. The preview results displayes the number of hits but does not display the actual results.

Please help.

Thank you

entry.title: Column Hide in Public Dimension
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Is there a possibility to hide a column in Public Dimension?

In my scenario, I have a public dimension " PLANT" & I need to hide a column "Company Name".

So, after going into PLANT dimension, I have selected the column "Company Name" and clicked Hide column option and then the column "Company Name" got hidden however when I tried to click SAVE button on the top, it is showing a pop-up message" You have no changes" which means it didn't get saved.

Can anyone advise whether it's an access issue with my id or in sac we can't save a hidden column?

Appreciate for your quick responses.

entry.title: Re: Inventory Stock Reversal in SAP: Best Practices for O...
entry.content: @Shalini_Singhal The page to the link you sent keeps loading. That page is really buggy as well.

entry.title: Business Builder in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi,

Does Business Layer make any sense now as the recomendation of SAP is to use analytics models for consumption? I am a little bit confused and it is not clear enough in which situations we should use Business Layers. Initially they were recommended for self-service but I think the business users have to create too many layers, which makes it too complex. The analytic model is not so complex, so I guess the users can be empowered to create their own analytic models. What is SAP position regarding the self-service? 

I'm looking forward to hearing your thoughts.

Thank you!

Cristina

entry.title: Case Creation in SAP Service Cloud V2
entry.content:
Use case : To demo an end to end flow of Customer experience for a B2C website using the following systems S/4HANA, SAP Commerce Cloud, Field Service Management (FSM), Service Cloud V2

Below are the queries for SAP Service Cloud V2:

1. How  can I  create tickets once the sales order is delivered  instead of creating manually?
2. Any available APIs or REST endpoints for creation/viewing of cases(service tickets) within SAP Service Cloud V2?
3. Is there a way where I can add products/serviceable products to a case(service tickets) as I can see we are able to add only registered products now into an case.

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Kolkata 2024
entry.content:
Sounds great @vdayal1994 
I hope you are already part of the Kolkata Group - if not, join it today 😊

entry.title: Re: How to Cancel Purchase Order in SAP S4 hana Public cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

To manage an item from a purchase order in the app, follow these steps in sequence:

  1. Navigate to the "Manage purchase order" section.
  2. Go to "Item" and select the desired, after that click on "Delete".
  3. Click on "Delete" to mark the item for deletion.

After completing these steps, when you save the purchase order, the status of the item will be updated to "Marked for deletion". Consequently, the net order value will also be adjusted to zero.

To finalize the deletion process of an item from the purchase order, the Archiving process is required.

Concerning the criteria for cancellation, it is primarily influenced by the specific internal reasons guiding this decision.

For more information on the archiving process, refer to the discussion available at this link:
https://answers.sap.com/questions/13250698/possible-to-delete-a-po.html.

This thread contains detailed answers and information previously provided regarding the necessary archiving process.

Kind Regards,

entry.title: Re: how to remove authentication and access a fiori app a...
entry.content: i couldnt access this code in github. can you please share xs-app.json code here. thanks.

entry.title: Change the Technical Administrator (TA) in Partner Demo Environment (PDE)
entry.content:
Hi,

I have successfully ordered and used the Partner Demo Environment (PDE), but I want to change the Technical Administrator due to the user being no longer active. I have requested to the support team but still no reply, and I am having a hard time looking for the configuration page. Is there a way to do this?

entry.title: What’s New in SAP Profitability and Performance Management 3.0 SP24
entry.content:
Hi Everyone.

SAP Profitability and Performance Management (PaPM) 3.0 is gearing up to unveil Support Package 24 (SP24) during the third week of March.

In this blog post, I'm thrilled to take you on an in-depth journey through the upcoming SAP PaPM SP24, highlighting features and enhancements that redefines how businesses harness the power of this innovative solution.

So, fasten your seatbelts as we explore the dynamic world of SAP PaPM, uncovering the transformative capabilities that SP24 brings to the table.

 

General Feature

Performance Improvements

Starting with SP24, the allocation logic has been optimized to significantly enhance the efficiency of the Allocation function’s processing.

 

Functions

Remote Function Adapter

We have introduced two new Remote Function Adapter (RFA) types designed for finance tasks: the “Finance Accounts Payable Items” and the “Finance Accounts Receivable Items”. Let me present you the functionalities of each RFA type.

Let’s start with “Finance Accounts Payable Items”. This new function type allows you to post an Accounts Payable entry to SAP ERP or SAP S/4HANA with multiple lines per document. It uses a grouping field to determine which lines are grouped together into one document. You can have multiple GL accounts or vendor accounts within each document. If an RFC destination is defined at the environment level, the entries are posted in that system.

Let me give you an example:

  1. Input Data

     

 

     2. Configuration of the Remote Function Adapter

a. Header

i. Remote Function Adapter Type: Finance Accounts Payable Items

ii. RFC Destination: The system where you want to post the entries

iii. Field Length Extension Mode: Target Mode

 

 

 

b. Rules: You may use the mapping below for your reference

 

 

 

 

 

 

You will then be able to verify the successful posting through the Object Key field.

 

 

 

 

Now let’s continue with the second new RFA type, which is the “Finance Accounts Receivable Items”. This function type allows you to post an Accounts Receivable entry to SAP ERP or SAP S/4HANA. Each record is mapped to one posting, with a customer account on one side and a GL account on the other. If an RFC destination is defined at the environment level, the entries are posted in that system.

Let me give you an example:

     1. Input Data

     

 

 

    2. Configuration of the Remote Function Adapter

a. Header

i. Remote Function Adapter Type: Finance Accounts Receivable Items

ii. RFC Destination: The system where you want to post the entries

iii. Field Length Extension Mode: Target Mode

 

 

 

b. Rules: You may use the mapping below for your reference

 

 

 

 

 

The successful posting is then returned in the Document Number.

 

 

 

 

For more information about the new RFA types, see SAP Note 3389306.

 

Enhancements

The PaPM solution undergoes continuous improvement to enhance the user experience. Below, you will find the enhancements included in the SP24 Release.

Manage and Deploy Processes

These enhancements directly impact Sorting and Filtering in Manage and Deploy Processes and My Activities application.

On the Processes screen, we introduced a new column Progress (%), which displays the progress as a rounded percentage. Please note that the rounding is always done to the nearest whole number (integer).

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Within the process tree, you can now sort and filter the values for each column, as long as it is technically feasible.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Delete Temporary Data

This enhancement provides you with the capability to choose the Process ID and Package ID in the Delete Temporary Data report. When using the Delete Temporary Data report (/NXI/P1_DELETE_TEMP_DATA), you can include the Process ID and Package ID as part of the selection criteria. Additionally, you have the flexibility to apply various conditions for both Inclusion and Exclusion, such as BETWEEN, EQUAL, CONTAINS PATTERN (using *), and so on.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

For Inclusion:

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

This is available for Exclusion as well:

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Sample Content

The sample content documentation offer insights and recommended approaches for structuring the system in relation to subjects and sectors.

Below, you will find the list of updated versions of standalone sample contents included in the SP24 Release

Sample Content

ID

Version

Corporate Sustainability ManagementSXD7
ESRS Disclosure ManagementSXQ2
EU Taxonomy Technical ScreeningSXU6
OECD BEPS 2.0 Tax Calculation and ReportingSXE7
OECD BEPS 2.0 Tax Calculation and Reporting Powered by SAP Group Reporting Data CollectionSXEGR03
Value Chain Sustainability ManagementSXC17

I appreciate your time spent reading this blog post! Stay tuned for upcoming improvements in our future releases of SAP PaPM 3.0.

If you have any inquiries related to this topic within the SAP Community, you can find answers in the Q&A section using the provided tag Link.

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
Hi @oscar_ips welcome and great, you took the time to reply to this thread. I have used a translator to translate from Spanish to English 😅 I think some others may not do so, so I would like to recommend to use English as the main conversational language here 😉

As your company is using SAP Business One, these topic pages might be interesting for you to get to know more:

  • https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/business-one
  • https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/business-one-extensibility

When you subscribe to the pages, you'll get notifications, once there are any updates. Also, you can subscribe to these SAP managed tags for SAP Business One:

  • https://community.sap.com/t5/c-khhcw49343/SAP+Business+One/pd-p/01200615320800000816
  • https://community.sap.com/t5/c-khhcw49343/SAP+Business+One+Extensibility/pd-p/37d7341b-a1cf-461e-9e60-47ede025c729
  • https://community.sap.com/t5/c-khhcw49343/SAP+Business+One+Cloud/pd-p/67837800100800006411

You see, there is a lot to consume here in SAP Community. Enjoy being part of it now.

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
Hello @Gastón_Muñoz_F and a warm welcome to Chile. Great you are now part of SAP Community.

You mentioned, you are at a "user level" - what about exploring our SAP topics to strengthen your knowledge? You can also subscribe to the specific SAP Managed Tags to get notified once new related content has been published.

entry.title: Re: Need .pem client certificate for CPI integration with other systems
entry.content: You'll need to be a bit more specific.

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
Hello @mukulcclbd welcome! 

Let me point to our SAP topic pages, which might help you to learn more about specific products, e.g. SAP S/4HANA. You can also subscribe to the specific SAP Managed Tags to get notified once new related content has been published. There are many for SAP S/4HANA, so please feel free to explore them in detail while searching for them here.

entry.title: Re: WHERE CAN I FIND CONFIGURATION GUIDES FOR S/4 HANA 2308
entry.content:
Hi 

In addition to the help, your best bet is the process navigator

https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/SolS/EARL_SolS-013

You want to filter on the best practices for Treasury - it will be under Finance in the list of LOBs.

Also check out the Accelerators section for Highlights of the various LOBs. or the implementation area in the Accelerators area for business questionnaires, the links to activate etc.

2308 and 2402 are both there, at this time, but 2308 will drop off.

You mentioned 2308 but customers would be upgraded to 2402, so I assume you are maybe trying to compare to a previous version.

Thank you

Jerry

entry.title: Re: SAP Stammtisch Munich
entry.content: @shravankumar I recommend to subscribe to the Munich Group as well as the SAP Stammtisch Event Calendar.

entry.title: Re: InvalidTaxException : Bad tax framework feature in SA...
entry.content:
Hello,

the tax policy should be the same at the charge plan level (See Tax of "Setting Up a Charge in a Charge Plan") and at the subscriber account level (See A tax system)

Please, check that you have disabled the tax feature at the 2 side. 

Best regards,

Eric F.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps - build service not working since 24 hours
entry.content: Monday March 18, 2024. Same problem with 4.9.201. March 8, 2024 it worked with 4.9.150. Should I just keep working on the app and hope it gets fixed?

entry.title: Enter a valid input (RWS 000079)
entry.content:
I am getting the following error and have confirmed I am using the correct creds and those creds have to appropriate premissions.

<error_code>RWS 000079</error_code>
    <message>Enter a valid input (RWS 000079)</message>
</error>
'

 After successfully using a request.get to the base url with /logon/long I am attempting the post for my logon token with the following logic: (the line break text not being passed to the login_data url)

login_url = f'http://{localhost}:{port}/biprws/logon/long'

login_data = f'<attrs xmlns="http://www.sap.com/rws/bip"><attr name={password} type="string"> \line break
</attr><attr name="clientType" type="string"></attr><attr name="auth" type="string"> \line break
possibilities="secEnterprise,secLDAP,secWinAD,secSAPR3">secEnterprise</attr><attr name={user_name} type="string"></attr></attrs>'

login_headers = {
'Accept': 'application/xml',
'Content-Type': 'application/xml'
}

# send the login request and retrieve the response
login_response = requests.post(login_url, headers=login_headers, data=login_data)

Can anyone help identify what's formatted incorrectly?

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Hello @_Gia welcome! Where are you from and what is your center of expertise?
I am Svea from the SAP Community team, working on initiatives for the SAP Community. 

To start in SAP Community, I would like to recommend to subscribe to SAP topic pages, SAP Managed tags or SAP Community Groups - just search for those, which are of most interest for you 🙂

  • SAP topic pages: https://pages.community.sap.com/topics
  • SAP managed tags: https://community.sap.com/t5/all-sap-managed-tags/ct-p/managed-tags
  • SAP Community Groups: https://community.sap.com/t5/interest-groups/ct-p/interests

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud - Landscape Architecture & Life-cycle Management
entry.content: Excellent content. single source of entire SAC landscape... Thank you very much for putting all together and response comments. It helps a lot.

entry.title: Re: New or not to the SAP Community, share your story!
entry.content:
Hello, thank you for including me in the Barcelona group.
I have been using SAP Business One since 2020, previously we used another version of SAP.
I use it for manufacturing orders, delivery notes, allocation of materials and other things.
But I would like to go one step further and create some queries to get some reports, but I can't join two queries and I don't know where I could consult

My English is very fair and I have used a translator

I'm sorry

entry.title: Senior SAP FICO Consultant - Tax/Vertex with Walmart Global Tech. (in Bentonville, AR)
entry.content:
Walmart Global Tech. is hiring for an:

Senior SAP FICO Consultant - Tax/Vertex

Job Description:

Role: Senior Software Engineer – SAP FICO Functional

Do you love building and pioneering in the technology space? Do you enjoy solving complex business problems in a fast-paced, collaborative, inclusive and iterative delivery environment? At Walmart, you’ll be part of a big group of makers, breakers, doers and disruptors, who love to solve real problems and meet real customer needs.

We are seeking a Senior Software Engineer – SAP FICO Functional, who is passionate about implementing and managing Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) technologies to join our team. As a Walmart Software Engineer, you’ll have the opportunity to be on the forefront of driving major financial transformations at Walmart scale.


About Team: Global Business Services
Our team is focused on developing a streamlined, dependable company that includes service operations and technology solutions for Finance, People, and Associate Digital Experience (ADE). We also provide a variety of services such as procurement, supplier portfolio management, merchandising master data, and analytics. From developing HR chatbots and virtual assistants to creating invoice solutions and facilitating legal changes, we help drive efficiency across Walmart globally. SAP Competency Center
 

What You’ll Do:

  • Drive design, development, implementation, documentation and follow agile development process. 
  • Build, test and deploy cutting edge solutions at scale, impacting associates of Walmart worldwide. 
  • Interact with Walmart engineering teams across geographies to leverage expertise and contribute to the tech community. 
  • Be involved in the successful implementation by applying technical skills, to design and build enhanced processes and technical solutions in support of strategic initiatives. 
  • Work closely with the Tech Leads/Architects and cross functional teams and follow established practices for the delivery of solutions meeting QCD (Quality, Cost & Delivery) within the established architectural guidelines. 
  • Follow TDD to ensure testing and code coverage. 
  • Learn new and changing technologies and adapt to ensure best software practices and standards. 
  • Participate in hiring and support to build teams 
  • Interact closely for requirements with Business owners and technical teams both within India and across the globe. 



What you'll bring:

Our Ideal Candidate

  • Our ideal candidate is an energetic, self-motivated individual focused on solving customer problems and willing to work in an innovative & challenging team environment. He/ She is a responsive team player who can proactively contribute at an individual level. He/ she is someone who thrives in a fun, fast-paced, dynamic, startup-like environment.

 

You’ll really wow us if…

  • Must have experience in SAP Finance areas like General Ledger, Accounts payable, Accounts Receivable, Controlling, Asset Accounting, Accounts Receivables, Bank Accounting, Tax, etc.
  • High level of functional competency regarding standard SAP configuration and functionality with understanding of best practices, new trends, technical advancements & future enhancements
  • Solid understanding of Accounts Receivable processes and SAP configuration of AR sub-ledger, business partner, contract accounts, collections management, dispute management, returns/credit memo management/workflow, payment plans, funds management, banking & business rule framework (BRF+), payment hierarchy, clearing rules, dunning, security deposits, payment clearings, open item management, tax calculations, installment plans, refund process, and write offs.
  • Experience with SAP support or green field implementations
  • Experience in implementing SAP S4 HANA solutions.
  • Master’s or bachelor’s in computer science or related field with at least 10 to 12 years of experience in SAP Finance modules.
  • Excellent communication skills.
  • Ability to work in agile environment using scrum tools like JIRA.
  • Experience with minimum 2 or 3 SAP FICO Implementations/Rollout Experience.
  • Good Problem-Solving Skills and ability to handle issues independently.
  • Field experience/expertise with the Tax domain / the Vertex suite of tools / solutions



About Walmart Global Tech
Imagine working in an environment where one line of code can make life easier for hundreds of millions of people. That’s what we do at Walmart Global Tech. We’re a team of software engineers, data scientists, cybersecurity expert's and service professionals within the world’s leading retailer who make an epic impact and are at the forefront of the next retail disruption. People are why we innovate, and people power our innovations. We are people-led and tech-empowered. We train our team in the skillsets of the future and bring in experts like you to help us grow. We have roles for those chasing their first opportunity as well as those looking for the opportunity that will define their career. Here, you can kickstart a great career in tech, gain new skills and experience for virtually every industry, or leverage your expertise to innovate at scale, impact millions and reimagine the future of retail.
 

Flexible, hybrid work:
We use a hybrid way of working that is primarily in office coupled with virtual when not onsite. Our campuses serve as a hub to enhance collaboration, bring us together for purpose and deliver on business needs. This approach helps us make quicker decisions, remove location barriers across our global team and be more flexible in our personal lives.

Benefits:
Benefits: Beyond our great compensation package, you can receive incentive awards for your performance. Other great perks include 401(k) match, stock purchase plan, paid maternity and parental leave, PTO, multiple health plans, and much more.

Equal Opportunity Employer:
Walmart, Inc. is an Equal Opportunity Employer – By Choice. We believe we are best equipped to help our associates, customers and the communities we serve live better when we really know them. That means understanding, respecting and valuing diversity- unique styles, experiences, identities, ideas and opinions – while being inclusive of all people.

Location:  Bentonville, AR

Salary Range: Starting @ $90,000/year, with cash bonus and annual RSU's.  We also offer such perks as discounts against what Walmart sells, flexible PTO, hybrid working conditions, and the coverage of relocation costs for those residing outside of the area.

About the candidate: We are looking for exceptionally qualified and experienced US-based applicants for this role.  This is a US-based position, and will support the transfer of existing H-1B Visas (sorry, no new visas will be supported for this need).  The ideal candidate will offer 7+ years of progressive field experience in SAP FICO consulting, within similar, large-scale, enterprise level clients, a Masters degree or higher, and will have relevant tax/Vertex experience.

Applying instructions: Please apply using the link below:

https://careers.walmart.com/us/jobs/WD1762270-senior-software-engineer-sap-fico-functional-tax-vertex

@Steve_Navarro 

NOTES:

1) This posting is intended for direct applicants.  We are not interested in agencies or consulting firms pitching their consultants to work for us on a CTC or 1099 basis.

2) Please no solicitations for recruiting agency or headhunter support.  We already have a stable of pre-approved vendors servicing our hiring needs, and are not looking to add.

entry.title: Post S/4 2023 upgrade, TM Cockpit does not show truck resources.
entry.content:
After S/4 2023 upgrade, Cockpit does not show truck resources and can’t add a resource manually in cockpit. There are no error messages or warnings. Prior to upgrade, cockpit was showing all resources according to planning profile. Resources are unchanged, not blocked and validity dates are active.

I verified the following although they are for older TM versions.

  1. Cockpit page layout - In the Trucks capacities area, verified the association is RESOURCE_ACTIVE_ROAD.
  2. In the MTr customizing the 'Schedule MTr' flag is unchecked on all resources

Appreciate any help to fix this.

entry.title: Re: Use Custom Business Object Data for CDS Views in Eclipse
entry.content: Sorry for the dumb question, but how do i run it in eclipse or better said

entry.title: Error during action in RAP application
entry.content:
I am trying to update item table duriog action in RAP application. Basically it updates the item table with internal table data. I am getting very generic error as below. 

 

Below is the statement I am using

    MODIFY  ENTITIES OF Root_entity IN LOCAL MODE ENTITY Root_entity
          CREATE BY \_item
          FROM  VALUE #( (
                         Root_Key  = '1'
                         Root_Key2 = '2'
                         %is_draft = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                         %target   = VALUE #( FOR
                                            ls_item IN lt_item INDEX INTO
                                            idx ( %cid                     = idx
                                                  %is_draft                = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                                                  item_key1                = 'value1'
                                                  %control-item_key1       = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                                                  item_data_field          = 'value2'
                                                  %control-item_data_field = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                                            ) ) ) )
                                       MAPPED mapped
                                        REPORTED reported
                                        FAILED failed.

is there any user exit or badi.

THanks with regards,

vallamuthu M

best regards

entry.title: PREP_GENCHECKS/EU_NAMETAB_CHECK Error during upgrade from 1909 to 2023
entry.content:
Hello,

During the upgrade from 1909 to 2023 in the checks phase i get this error

"Table DDNTT will be exported joined with fields table.
Task failed with error: (NTC) Illegal empty block for entry table/blocknr ''/0!"

 

Did anyone encouter this error and how can it be resolved.

 

Thanks in advance for your answers.

entry.title: Re: SAC Linked Analysis | RemoveDimensionFilter API
entry.content: Dear, you are right the method is available. It can be executed as well, but it doesnt return the desired output as the filter does not get removed. Could you further elaborate how you would utilize these APIs to rebuild the linked analysis? Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Migrating AFO reports to SAC
entry.content:
Hello Thami,
you can leverage the SAP Analysis for Microsoft Office Edition for SAP Analytics Cloud - it is part of the SAP Analytics Cloud subscription and this is how you would use the workbooks stored in SAP Analytics Cloud repository.

BR,
Jens

entry.title: Badi MM_PUR_S4_PO_FLDCNTRL_SIMPLE - NETPRICEAMOUNT field
entry.content:
Hi All, 

In s/4 Public cloud, based on note 3268822 - Field Control in Purchase Orders and Purchase Requistions in S/4HANA Cloud 

we are trying to implement BADI MM_PUR_S4_PO_FLDCNTRL_SIMPLE to hide NETPRICEAMOUNT field.

Field NETPRICEAMOUNT is visible in the debug, as a field possible to influence, and listed in the BADI description in SAP help 

App Extensibility: Manage Purchase Orders 

Is there any other possibility to hide specific field (in this case NETPRICEAMOUNT on PO item level) in S4H Public?

entry.title: Material status error not shown in Check Material Coverage app or MD01N when running MRP
entry.content:
Hi,
After upgrading the system to the 2022 release of S/4HANA, we are having problems with the material status where MRP has been restricted with a B in the configuration of the status.

When running MRP for the material with a status that should prevent MRP, the message "MRP run completed" is given without any pop-up saying that MRP is not allowed because of the material status. The MRP is actually not executed, so the material status is blocked the MRP technically - but not providing any info. The same goes for MD01N where no messages are displayed for the material.

When entering MD04, the system provides the right error message. Also, in MD02 the system provides the correct message before MRP is executed for the single material.

Of course, users must have the possibility to see the errors/warnings from the MRP Live run.

Has anyone experienced similar behavior after upgrading? No notes describe the exact problem mentioned.

entry.title: Re: SAC Linked Analysis | RemoveDimensionFilter API
entry.content: Hi, I will describe my workaround as a new answer because comments are very limited in terms of format/layout...

entry.title: Re: Client's requirements is to calculate commissions in...
entry.content:
In theory you could probably do such a thing, using some external system to trigger a pipeline for every single credit fed in and run a per-position pipeline. 

But the question becomes why would you want to? For any normal volume of users this would result in a large amount of pipelines per day. You could end up with multiple pipelines queued depending on the how long it takes to process. Unless your volumes are low and your pipelines in the minutes then this may become difficult.

Also as you say the calendar leaf period is a limitation here.  If you re-run the pipeline for that day you'd re-calculate all the results for that day so posting becomes necessary if you want to keep records of those payouts. But if a mistake is made it's going to be hard to undo it given the timings. 

I've seen daily runs before but never "instant" payouts like this.

entry.title: Re: Purchase Order Creation The purchasing group cannot b...
entry.content:
Hello,

It is advised to verify and compare the purchaser role currently assigned with the standard role designated as “SAP_BR_PURCHASER.” It is essential to ensure that the user possesses unrestricted access akin to that provided in the standard role.

To facilitate the modification of the purchasing group in a purchase order, please utilize the edit button found within the purchase order interface. This action can be executed through the "Manage Purchase Orders" application in SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

It is also important to note that the capability to edit fields within a purchase order may be influenced by the document's status.

For a comprehensive understanding and detailed instructions on editing an existing purchase order, please refer to the SAP help page "Manage Purchase Orders", specifically the section titled "Editing an Existing Purchasing Order."

Kind Regards,

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Hello @amyb519 thanks for your honest reply. I can understand that it's exciting and scary at the same time... in the beginning it's often a lot. 

Let me give you some insights to SAP Community, which I am convinced will help you, to strengthen your skills. You can start with our SAP topic pages: https://pages.community.sap.com/topics, where information about SAP products are posted. When you subscribe to SAP managed tags: https://community.sap.com/t5/all-sap-managed-tags/ct-p/managed-tags, you'll get notifications once there is new content published. Our SAP Community Interest Groups: https://community.sap.com/t5/interest-groups/ct-p/interests are a great opportunity to connect and exchange with other community members.

I hope this helps!

entry.title: SAP CAP Object Store Deploy Cross Sub Account Pay as you go & CPEA issue
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

I've an issue with the Object Store service plan difference between account Pas as you go and CPEA

My case

Dev system sub-account Pas as you go: Object Store service plan is standard

UAT/PRD system sub-account CPEA: The object Store service plan is s3-standard

I've to change the service plan in mta.yaml when deploying to the UAT/PRD system it's a little bit confusing and hard to manage the source code. Because the service plan is not the same.

I might use Jenkins pipeline to inject properties of mta.yaml to set service plan for each sub-account but not pretty sure it's a good way

Please give me advice or best practice to deal with it (instead of changing source code when deploying to QAS/PRD).

entry.title: SAP Build Apps - How to do Data Refresh for Marketplace installed component?
entry.content:
One of SAP Build App's page, using marketplace installed component "Basic list with selection on right" and bound to STD SAP OData service /API_PRODUCT_SRV/A_Product. How to do based on search condition or button click to refresh data shown in list? List connected directly with data source via Data Adapter instead of data variable. Unable reload the data in list and tried with component template editor, added 'Fired from "Trigger event"' and connected to the "Data | Get record collection" in flow logic. But this event is not visible to bind it to button outside of installed component in a page.

   

SAP Build

entry.title: Retreival of the Archived BCS (Buiness Communication Services) data from the SAP Content Server
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We haven't found any concrete process to retrieve the archived BCS data (of DB table SOFFCONT1) from the SAP content server back into the DB table of the SAP system. 

Do we've any standard procedure to it, officially from SAP?

 

Thanks & best regards

Sreenivas

entry.title: Need to design CAP solution to query the external REST API service
entry.content:
Dear Folks,

I have one requirement that I want to build one solution for client in that I am getting data in my CAP application from External REST API service, which got triggered from SAP's Cloud Product on sending the payload from UI layer. 

Further Details: 

It is the same as the SAP Side by Side extension development, where our data will get queried on the user's input from SAP's Field glass. Please suggest the best optimize solution to build. 

Need input on :

Type of calls from FG to Extension app to build ?

What type of interface that we focus on freestyle or elements ?

How to access the External REST API data in an extension app with user details(assume as query)?

Please provide any architectural information also in detail.

entry.title: Re: About SAP Enable Now Workarea Folder Structure
entry.content: Yes, best practice is to always put everything under Root, and keep Unsorted empty. That will significantly simplify locating this content and synchronizing it.

entry.title: Re: Can I create a SCORM Book in Enable Now that sends co...
entry.content: You can create a Quiz with a single 'attestation' question (e.g. "I confirm I have completed the required training") and then use completion of the Quiz (one button, always correct, 100% pass) to trigger completion of the course.

entry.title: Re: Extracting Multiple PO's in single invoice in SAP Buiild Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi,

I've not seen a scenario where one invoice will have multiple PO's. Its the other way one PO (blanket PO) can have multiple invoices

Regards, Sachin K

entry.title: Re: InvalidTaxException : Bad tax framework feature in SA...
entry.content: Yes, the tax has been disabled at both the places and now its working as expected. Thanks!

Janet

entry.title: Re: Treasury and Risk Management for Public Cloud TDD System
entry.content: Hi Priyanka, thank you for your reply! Yes, this was also done, i.e. I reach out to SAP asking FIN-FSCM-TRM-CNT processes/best practise content to be activated and got a reply that this scope is rejected. I was advised to contact TDD@sap.com, who also replied that this contect cannot be added to TDD system. That basically concludes & confirms my assumption. That, though, is frustrating, because how then SAP expects their partners doing demos and give advise on solution. Besides, based on Grow with SAP webinar, SAP announced about Grow with SAP Advanced Treasury and Risk Management add-on package from April 24. I hope then something is changed, but for now this seems a dead end.

entry.title: Blog Series – SAP S/4 HANA Supply Chain for TM – 07 – Dimensional weight and TM charge calculation
entry.content:
Since ‘advanced shipping’ (new terminology from SAP for ‘professional shipping’) in SAP S/4HANA Supply Chain for Transportation Management (TM) has additional license cost, it is necessary to understand the benefits it offers while resolving various business problems in the transportation process. The last two blogs (Integrated MM subcontracting and integrated SD consignment process) focused mostly on integrated transportation scenarios. However, this blog focuses on core transportation process during charge calculation which plays a major role in freight settlement process.  

A short overview of freight settlement process is detailed in Blog 3 (https://community.sap.com/t5/supply-chain-management-blogs-by-members/blog-series-sap-s-4-hana-supply-chain-for-transportation-management-03/ba-p/13358974)   which focused on freight settlement and event driven charge calculation. The accuracy of charges calculated is important in freight settlement process and a good TMS should be able to handle most of the calculation techniques used by various carriers. One such calculation method the use dimensional weight of the product that is transported.

Introduction: Dimensional weight

In scenarios where the entire truck/equipment is not hired to ship the products, shipping/freight costs have historically been calculated based on gross weight in kilograms or pounds. (LTL/Parcel scenarios). By charging only by weight, lightweight/low-density packages become unprofitable for freight carriers due to the amount of space they take up in the truck/aircraft/shipping container in proportion to their actual weight.

Dimensional weight, also known as volumetric weight or DIM weight, is a measure of the space that a package occupies in relation to its actual weight. The dimensional weight is determined by multiplying the length, width, and height of the package, and then dividing by a dimensional factor that varies depending on the company and the unit of measurement. The shipping cost is based on the greater of the dimensional weight or the actual weight of the package. So, a carton of books will likely be charged by gross weight whereas a box of tissue paper will probably be charged by its dimensional weight. This is because the large box of tissue paper takes up a lot of space but does not fill up a vehicle's capacity in terms of weight, making it an inefficient use of space. The concept of dimensional weight has been adopted by the transportation industry worldwide as a uniform means of establishing the charge for the cubic space a package occupies. This is predominantly used in road mode (LTL/Parcel). However, ocean (LCL) and air carriers also utilize dimensional weight based charge calculation.

For example, FedEx multiplies length, width, and height in inches. Round each measurement to the nearest whole inch. The resulting total is the cubic size of the package. Since FedEx uses 139 as the dimensional wight factor for U.S., Puerto Rico, and international shipments, they divide the above cubic size by 139 and arrive the dimensional weight in pounds.  Please note that the DIM factor value is dependent on the unit of measure. In the above example, 139 is used when the length, height and width are in inches and resulting dimensional weight is in pounds (LB).

Carriers and LSPs arrive at this dimensional weight factor after a detailed study and thorough analysis of results. These can be changed or updated by the carrier. From June 2019, the new USPS divisor (DIM Factor) for DIM pricing is 166, a reduction from the old divisor of 194. The lower the divisor, the higher the dimensional weight and thus the shipping cost (for low density materials). Also, in the case of non-rectangular packages, other calculation techniques and adjustments factors may be used by some carriers to arrive at the dimensional weight.

Shippers avoid dimensional weight charges by using smaller boxes, by compressing their goods, and by reducing the use of packing materials. Dimensional weight is also used for invoicing by air freight forwarders, and commercial airlines worldwide. Dim weight pricing may reduce shipping costs for customers who pack more efficiently. Reducing packaging can make shipments more environmentally friendly by helping lower fuel emissions and reduce the carbon footprint. Additionally, this cuts the costs of overpacking and thereby reduce in waste generation.

Some references are provided below to learn more about news in the transportation industry related to dimensional weight. 

  • June 13, 2019: USPS DIM Changes Set to Go into Effect on June - 23
    https://multichannelmerchant.com/operations/usps-dim-changes-set-go-effect-june-23/ 
  • July 01, 2022: Old Dominion testing simplified LTL pricing program
    https://www.freightwaves.com/news/old-dominion-testing-simplified-ltl-pricing-program 
  • Jul 1, 2023: FedEx improving LTL shipping efficiency, increasing sustainability with space and pace pilot
    https://www.ccjdigital.com/ccj-innovators/article/15541417/fedex-improving-ltl-shipping-efficiency-increasing-sustainability-with-space-and-pace-pilot 
  • Oct 1, 2023: Averitt's new LTL quote system offers more 'surgical' approach to pricing
    https://www.ccjdigital.com/ccj-innovators/article/15634893/averitts-surgical-approach-to-ltl-pricing

SAP Solution:

SAP S/4 HANA Supply Chain for Transportation Management has a comprehensive charge calculation engine to calculate accurate charges for transportation process. SAP TM charge calculation relies on Freight Agreement master data to calculate charges and support various scenarios including dimensional weight pricing. Freight agreements along with calculation sheets, rates, and scales are used to efficiently manage long-term contracts with the carriers. Freight Agreement structure in SAP TM is illustrated below.

 [SAP Press Book: Transportation Management with SAP S/4HANA]

For more details, please refer SAP Help: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/e3dc5400c1cc41d1bc0ae0e7fd9aa5a2/a1d8bc8e5bbe474c846c30cff4244646.html 

Dimensional weight set up and Master Data:

In SAP TM, we can define the DIM factor as configuration. Config Path: SPRO - TM - Basic Functions - Charge Calculation - Data Source Binding - Define Dimensional Weight Profiles

For example, in the above screenshot the DIM weight profile is created for a DIM factor 139 for the Gross Volume (Length X Height X Width) in inch^3 and the weight arrived after the calculation is in Pounds (LB). So, if a carrier changes the DIM Factor or uses a different unit of measure (non-US carriers such as DHL etc....), the above configuration can be updated to cater to the changes.

We can assign this DIM weight profile to the header of freight agreement master data. If required, there is also the option to maintain the DIM weight profile at the freight agreement item level. (specific to a charge calculation sheet (TCCS).

Fiori App – Edit Freight Agreement

In addition to this, in the rate table of the base freight, we can update the calculation rule with calculation base as chargeable weight.

Example/Demo:

To demonstrate how SAP TM calculates dimensional weight and arrive at the freight cost, I have assumed following factors:

  • DIM weight factor is 139 inch3/LB
  • Weight in LB and volume in inch^3
  • Package is cuboid in shape
  • For moving from Houston, TX to Ontario, CA carrier charges 100 USD per chargeable weight (Dimensional weight or actual weight whichever is higher)
  • Fuel Surcharge = 10% of Base Freight

Scenario1: High Density Material

  • Gross Weight = 15 LB,
  • Gross volume (LxWxH) = 1390 inch3
  • Base UoM = EA & 1 EA = 15 LB
  • Sales Order/FU/FO quantity = 10 EA
  • Dimensional weight for 10 EA = 100 LB (1390 inc^3/139 *10)
  • Actual weight = 150 LB
  • Chargeable weight = Higher of Dim weight/Actual weight = 150 LB
  • Base Freight = 150*100 = 1500 USD
  • Total Freight including Fuel = 1650 USD

Item details of Freight Order:

 Calculation details of Freight Order:

  Scenario 2: Low Density Material:

  • Gross Weight = 5 LB,
  • Gross volume (LxWxH) = 1390 inch3
  • Base UoM = EA & 1 EA = 10 LB
  • Sales Order/FU/FO quantity = 10 EA
  • Actual weight = 50 LB
  • Dimensional weight for 10 EA = 100 LB (1390 inc^3/139 *10)
  • Chargeable weight = Higher of Dim weight/Actual weight = 100 LB
  • Base Freight = 100*10= 1000 USD
  • Total Freight Cost including fuel= 1100 USD

 Item details of Freight Order:

  Calculation details of Freight Order:

Please note that the final charge calculation structure may not be as simple as I shared above. To showcase the dimensional weight functionality of SAP TM charge calculation process, I have simplified freight agreement and the charge structure.

To arrive at the accurate freight cost in a freight order, there may be multiple factors in addition to dimensional weight. For example, for an LTL shipment, some of the important factors are:

  • Weight & Volume
  • Density
  • Distance
  • Minimum freight cost per lane
  • Negotiated rate tariffs / discounts.
  • Classification of Freight or NMFC freight Class (North America specific)
  • Freight All Kinds (FAK): Multiple products billed at the same freight class.
  • Fuel Surcharges
  • Other Accessorials (Lift gate service, Inside Delivery etc…)

SAP TM can handle most of the requirements in the transportation industry and it can even connect to an external system via interfaces to calculate the charges. For example, SAP TM has an out of the box integration with SMC3/Czarlite to get the base freight for LTL moves in North America. Additionally, there are standard enhancements spots available to cater to unique requirements of specific shippers/carriers in the charge calculation area.

Conclusion:

Dimensional weight-based pricing is a well-established practice of calculating freight cost and SAP TM has the capability to calculate freight cost based on dimensional weight pricing. In SAP TM, we can configure the DIM factor as per the requirements of the carriers across regions with different UoMs (Unit of Measure) and assign it to the Freight Agreements. Additionally, if there are any changes in the DIM factor or other parameters, SAP TM can cater to these requirements by updating the DIM factor configuration.  Moreover, enhancement spots are available to cater to complex/unique requirements of specific shippers/carriers.

Estimating accurate freight charges is critical as it helps in charging customers and accruing the freight cost correctly. It also reduces the dispute when carriers send invoices and helps in the ‘Cost and Profitability Analysis’ of sales process. In SAP LE-TRA or S/4 HANA basic shipping, it is not possible to utilize these advanced functionalities in charge calculation. However, with SAP S/4 HANA TM advanced shipping, these requirements can be fulfilled, and it can estimate accurate charges and reduce the disputes. Hence advanced shipping in S/4 HANA Supply Cain for TM can be a compelling business case and is critical to achieve efficient transportation process for many shippers/manufacturers.

Link to other blog posts: https://community.sap.com/t5/user/viewprofilepage/user-id/179579

entry.title: Unable to Assign Firefighter ID to Firefighter Owner ID
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts,

I'm trying to assign Firefighter ID to Firefighter Owner ID in GRC system. 

However, system is showing the errors mentioned in the attached screenshots.

I had created Firefighter ID's in both, SAP ECC as well as SAP GRC systems.

Also, I had checked all the post-installation related configurations. All configurations were properly done.

Still the same issue persists.

Please advise, how to resolve this error.

entry.title: Re: Merging Spaces and Pages
entry.content:
Hi Kattia

Sure! we are now using cloud foundry as the entry point for fiori for all our systems. When we have an abap back "enough" up to date, we are exposing the content with content federation, other backend with lower version we redo the tiles in SAP build work zone.

So far we are using catalogs and groups, but the merging feature is much appealing to have a more dynamic content for the end users based on roles assigned to them. (and we have to redo a lot around fiori, so best to embrace spaces and pages right away.. and merging seems an awesome capability)

In Cloud foundry  (both sap build work zone std or advanced edition) I still don't see the option for merging pages or spaces (and pages or spaces  are not available in the advanced edition to create them), hence will it work with pages and spaces (merged) exposed from the back end? Is there any plans to integrate merging capabilities directly into cloud foundry?

Kind regards,

Michel

entry.title: How to connect to Databricks DB using JDBC and extract records using SAP Cloud Integration
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Please suggest how to connect to Databricks DB for JDBC connection using SAP Cloud Integration.

 I have check there is no option to upload databricks drivers under Manage Security -> JDBC Material -> JDBC Driver. I found only below Database types

1. Oracle

2. DB2

3. Microsoft SQL Server

I want to make a connection to databricks sql using JDBC connection

Sample URL:

jdbc:databricks://<hostname>.18.azuredatabricks.net:443/default;transportMode=http;ssl=1;AuthMech=3;httpPath=/sql/1.0/warehouses/12345;

Thanks,
Varun

entry.title: SAP Commerce 2205 - rush link generates wrong symbolic link for custom smartedit extension
entry.content:
Good day SAP Community.

I have been struggling since last week to make my custom smartedit extension work.

I am in the process of finishing the migration from 2011 to 2205 for our SAP Commerce installation.

I have performed the migrateSmarteditExtension command and it successfully completed.

When I then attempt to run ant all (or updatesystem) the rush link command creates symbolic links, but the links it creates are wrong as it adds an extra (/hybris) in the link.

 

Following the creation of these bad links, the build fails as it attempts to access smartedittools content using the bad link

I am using SAPCommerce 2205.23, running on Windows.

Anybody has had this issue in the past?

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Material status error not shown in Check Material Cov...
entry.content: In S4, you can create a new MRP area to exclude for plant or storage location in SPRO and then assign that MRP area to your materials. Run MRP and now check no MRP run for materials those have new MRP area!

entry.title: Re: SAC Linked Analysis | RemoveDimensionFilter API
entry.content:
Hi,
here my workaround.
I have a live BW story with multiple charts

  • filtering in one chart should have an effect on all other charts/tables ( = linked analysis)
  • as users want to jump to another story or to an ERP transaction with the same filters they set in the story I need to be able to read the current filter situation to create the URL.

I have decided not to use built-in linked analysis because at this point in time .getDimensionFilters returns an empty array if used in combination with linked analysis. 
Therefore I wanted to use a users selection within one or multiple charts as basis for filtering.
As users want to change the charts dimensions I initially used standard dimension input controls. However, there is no working API which will return current selected dimension/s directly from the input control.
If the number of used dimensions is very small you could use the workaround from @tablespace described here (he uses input controls to get active selected members). But that was not suitable for my use case as more than 25 dimensions are being used and performance degraded very fast.
That is why I am now using dropdowns instead of dimension input controls because Dropdown_XY..getSelectedKey() always works without problems (to get the current dimension from a chart directly with 

console.log(Chart_1.getDimensions(Feed.CategoryAxis));

gives back an empty array).
To get a users selection and use that for filtering was a little bit tricky. If you use a charts built-in onSelect method to e.g. console.log() the current selection than you will always get the users selection. But I wanted the user to be able to select one or more dim members in a chart and filtering should only start if he pushes a specific filter button which appears if  selection length > 0. 
Unfortunately, this does only work if user selects more than 1 member. If only one member is selected and the filter button is pushed the selection is lost. If 2 or more members have been selected and the filter button is pushed => selection is available.
I am now using a global variable for each chart and whenever selection length is > 0 this variable is populated. Function called with charts onSelect method:

var sel = Chart.getSelections();
if (sel.length > 0) {
	if (Chart === Ch_1) {
		v_Ch_1_sel = sel;
	}
	if (Chart === Ch_2) {
		v_Ch_2_sel = sel;
	}
...
...

the filter button uses coding below to push the filter to a story filter object:

var FS = Application.getFileDataSource("yourModelID");
//example for chart 1 for simplification
var currentDimID = Dd_Ch_1.getSelectedKey();
var currentDimDescr = Dd_Ch_1.getSelectedText();

// onSelect will be triggered after filter is being set, therfore
// use condition sel.length > 0 to stopt that
if (v_Ch_1_sel.length > 0) {    
    var filterValues = ArrayUtils.create(Type.string);
    for (var i = 0; i < v_Ch_1_sel.length; i++) {
        var filterValue = v_Ch_1_sel[i][currentDimID];
        if (filterValues.includes(filterValue)) {} else {
            filterValues.push(filterValue);
        }
    }
    FS.setDimensionFilterWithHierarchy({id: currentDimID, description: currentDimDescr}, Alias.FlatHierarchy, filterValues);
	v_Ch_1_sel.splice(0, v_Ch_1_sel.length);
}

with that I have all other objects in the story with the same filter situation and I can use

FS.removeDimensionFilter("dimensionXYZ");

to get rid of one or all dim filters.
br
edgar

entry.title: Re: PO release strategy does not showing tick icon
entry.content: Better create a SAP message/ SAP case ID for SAP to suggest for your issue on icon missing!

entry.title: Grid with Grouping - Select checkbox
entry.content:
Dear Good Morning, query how to select the checkboxes in a group query that is displayed in a grid, photo attached.

When I select the checks and want to print which checks have been marked, I get the following error:  "Add-on 9000037 failed with an exception. Event type: 6"

I attached code:

for (int k = 0; k < oGrid.Rows.Count-1; k++)
{

string IsSelected = oGrid.DataTable.GetValue("Select", k).ToString();

System.Diagnostics.Debug.WriteLine(IsSelected);

}

Note: In this  string IsSelected = oGrid.DataTable.GetValue("Select", k).ToString(); Error Offset de registro no válido [131-183]

With this I load the grid


cadena = "select CardCode , 'SelectRow' as 'Select',DocEntry, DocNum, CardName, DocDate, DocTotal, DocStatus from OPCH where CANCELED='N' and DocDate between '" + EditText0.Value + "' and '" + EditText1.Value + "' and DocStatus <>'C' group by CardCode,CardName,DocEntry, DocNum,DocDate, DocTotal, DocStatus --and DocType='S' ";
oForm.DataSources.DataTables.Item(0).Clear();
oForm.DataSources.DataTables.Item(0).ExecuteQuery(cadena);
oGrid.DataTable = oForm.DataSources.DataTables.Item("DT_0");

oForm.Freeze(true);
oForm.DataSources.DataTables.Item(0).ExecuteQuery(cadena);
oGrid.CollapseLevel = 1;
oForm.Freeze(false);
oEditColumn = ((SAPbouiCOM.EditTextColumn)(oGrid.Columns.Item("Select")));
oEditColumn.Type = BoGridColumnType.gct_CheckBox;

 

oGrid.AutoResizeColumns();
oEditColumn = ((SAPbouiCOM.EditTextColumn)(oGrid.Columns.Item("CardCode")));
oEditColumn.LinkedObjectType = "2";
oEditColumn = ((SAPbouiCOM.EditTextColumn)(oGrid.Columns.Item("DocEntry")));
oEditColumn.LinkedObjectType = "18";


// Set columns size
oGrid.Columns.Item(0).Width = 50;
oGrid.Columns.Item(1).Width = 60;
oGrid.Columns.Item(2).Width = 130;

Please your support.

Kind regards

entry.title: Re: Recruitment Marketing
entry.content:
Hi, There are ways to do it. 

1. To gather data on the whole site, paste it in global JS

2. To gather data on a page, add custom plugin > add a script tag > paste the code within those tags > You are done.

entry.title: Re: Interest Nominal Calculation - Does not Match with Percentage Rate
entry.content: Issue resolved ..

entry.title: Re: Recruitment Marketing
entry.content: Hi, There are ways to do it. 1. To gather data on the whole site, paste it in global JS 2. To gather data on a page, add custom plugin > add a script tag > paste the code within those tags > You are done.

entry.title: Re: Interest Nominal Calculation - Does not Match with Pe...
entry.content:
Issue Resolved .. 

50000000 * Percentage Rate/100 * <Working Days>/252

entry.title: SAP IdDS attribute from custom schema not in response payload
entry.content:
Hello,

I've created a custom schema for groups with the attribute sourceSystem but I'm not getting the schema and the attribute value in my response.

Schema:

Source System transformation:
"group": {
"mappings": [
{
"sourcePath": "$.id",
"targetVariable": "entityIdSourceSystem"
},
{
"targetPath": "$.schemas[0]",
"constant": "urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:core:2.0:Group"
},
{
"targetPath": "$.schemas[1]",
"constant": "urn:sap:cloud:scim:schemas:extension:custom:2.0:Group"
},
{
"targetPath": "$.schemas[2]",
"constant": "urn:sap:cloud:scim:schemas:extension:xxxxx:2.0:Group"
},
{
"sourcePath": "$['urn:sap:cloud:scim:schemas:extension:custom:2.0:Group']['name']",
"targetPath": "$['urn:sap:cloud:scim:schemas:extension:custom:2.0:Group']['name']"
},
{
"sourcePath": "$.displayName",
"targetPath": "$.displayName"
},
{
"sourcePath": "$['urn:sap:cloud:scim:schemas:extension:xxxxx:2.0:Group']['sourceSystem']",
"targetPath": "$['urn:sap:cloud:scim:schemas:extension:xxxxx:2.0:Group']['sourceSystem']"
},
{
"sourcePath": "$.members",
"targetPath": "$.members",
"optional": true,
"preserveArrayWithSingleElement": true
}
]
}
}

 

api.sap.com

"Try out" in api.sap.com

Payload for response of an example group:

{
  "id": "xxxxxxxx",
  "meta": {
    "created": "2024-03-18T13:44:19Z",
    "lastModified": "2024-03-18T13:44:19Z",
    "location": "accounts.ondemand.com/scim/Groups/xxxxxxx",
    "resourceType": "Group"
  },
  "schemas": [
    "urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:core:2.0:Group",
    "urn:sap:cloud:scim:schemas:extension:custom:2.0:Group"
  ],
  "displayName": "IBP-TEST_TEST_ROLE_1",
  "urn:sap:cloud:scim:schemas:extension:custom:2.0:Group": {
    "name": "ABC",
    "additionalId": "65f84533cfa5e50d9ea4a785"
  }
    

 There is no custom schema and no sourceSystem attribute at all.

Does anybody know what is missing?

Best regards
Klaus

entry.title: Re: Accessing On-Premises HTTP APIs with SAP Build Process Automation and SAP Cloud Connector
entry.content:
Hi Felix,

Process Automation forces me to use Internet Proxy. How can I change back to OnPremise?

According to this SAP Note it is only possible via Internet Proxy. https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/sap-note-3251797-only-destinations-with-one-of-the-following-proxy-types/ba-p/13558396

But I remember that some time ago it was possible to use OnPrem.

Kind regards

entry.title: Re: filling up free capacity with producing requests earl...
entry.content: Hi hamzamujeebk - thanks a lot for your prompt feedback. Concerning topic 4 and 5 I tried to follow in my IBP-system - but totally clear where and how to maintain this

entry.title: Re: How to do a initial load of roles from source system...
entry.content: That was a wrong assumption. I've now used property ibp.roles.prefix to mark groups from IBP and than I saw that all roles are loaded, assigned and not assigned ones to users.

entry.title: Re: condition type FOR VENDOR
entry.content:
Fixed or Percentage depends on Calculation Type in condition type where as Calculation Type A is used Percentage and Calculation Type B is sued for Fixed Amount.

Either you need to change that condition type Calculation Type  A to B permanently in configuration and move the change to work system  or create a new condition type with Calculation Type B for your requirement!

entry.title: S4HC/应收票据认领问题
entry.content: HI,SAP专家 应收票据认领时，生成如下会计凭证： 借：应收票据1121010000——客户 贷：应收账款1122010000——客户 但是，该分录不能满足我们的业务需求，我们想要生成如下会计凭证，能否实现？ 借：应收票据1121010000——银行 贷：应收账款1122010000——客户

entry.title: Re: filling up free capacity with producing requests earl...
entry.content: Opened "Order-based-planning-configuration" -> planning-run-profiles -> Profil: PUSHDEPLRUN -> then I see starting with Demand Selection ... general Parameters --- for me it's not clear where exactly I have to define the time-horizon for bringing production forward? Would be so nice if you can give me a detailed hint - Thanks 🙂 Jo

entry.title: Re: filling up free capacity with producing requests earl...
entry.content: sorry - a mistake - wanted to tell: but not totally clear where and how to maintain this

entry.title: Re: Contract creation via transaction code ME31K then whi...
entry.content: ME31K mostly used in MM module in ECC but the same used in Sourcing and Procurement  in S4 .  The data created mostly used/referred  by  Sourcing and Procurement  department along with Finance department within an organization.

entry.title: Re: How to establish SSO between SuccessFactors EC & ECPayroll?
entry.content:
Hey,

We also have the same architecture where the corporate identity provider is Azure.

We have migrated to IAS within Successfactors and also ran the upgrade to enable IAS for ec payroll.

Have followed the steps as per guide but gives an error "No user found with alias XXX". The alias in EC payroll and IAS matches to be the UUid but still it errors out.

Has anyone faced this issue, please share if any suggestions.

Thanks

Regards

Vidya

entry.title: Re: No more possible to change the content of a PR or PO
entry.content: Changeability indicator 1 can be used for PR but in case of PO you need to cross check the requirement from business as there are maximum chance PO can be created and later edited based on vendor feed back or price change or any change on condition/S of purchase !

entry.title: Hide Toolbar Button from Standard Fiori App F0673A
entry.content:
Hello, Hide,Button

i have a requirement to hide this Button "Set to Defer" from Smart table Toolbar.

First i tried to do it using "Adapt UIi" tools, but i couldn't select my button with it.

Second i tried a controller extension with the quick code below to hide the button. I changed value from the model binding the visibility of the button (below).

also tried used ById.setVisible(false) but without success. 

On SAPUI5 Visual Editor all the properties of the button are disable and can't be modified.

any suggestion ? 

Thank you

entry.title: Re: How to Make the Transition from SAP GTS 11.0 to SAP Global Trade Services, edition for SAP HANA
entry.content:
Hello,

Is a co-deployment variant with SAP ECC and SAP GTS, edition for SAP HANA (separate client) possible?

entry.title: But where do I use this variable?
entry.content:
Hi,
I tend to make somewhat huge applications and I'm looking for an efficient method to integrate comments into SAP Builder logic... I already had this problem with AppGyver... and another problem is finding or a Variable is used in a page or in an app.
Do you have an idea for a solution or otherwise, thank you guys at SAP for thinking about that... This is a huge limitation of your solution as soon as the application becomes huge!
Thanks

entry.title: A Robust Security Package for the SAP Customer Data Cloud (CIAM)
entry.content:
In today’s fast-paced digital sphere, managing customer identities and data has become a significant task for businesses. It has become crucial to have a functional system that can robustly handle user identities, access management, and data privacy. 

The SAP Customer Data Cloud (CIAM) – Security Package securely regulates user access and provides a secure environment for customer data.

  1. CIAM comprises an identity management solution that simplifies customer data management. It offers Single Sign-On (SSO), robust registration, and social login options to streamline user experience and boost customer engagement. The data is stored securely, given the strict compliance standards that the software adheres to.
  1. Security Package offers multi-factor authentication, risk-based authentication, and advanced security reporting to safeguard against data fraud. It not only protects sensitive data from potential breaches but also maintains regular auditing to ensure persistent monitoring and control of data access.
  1. Privacy and Consent Management. Compliance is a significant aspect that businesses need to employ diligently. It provides comprehensive regulatory functionality that helps businesses stay compliant with various data protection regulations across the globe. It allows users to conveniently manage their consent preferences, making the business more trustworthy.

To understand the SAP Customer Data Cloud (CIAM) features and functions more deeply, check  the blog. It provides a broad perspective on the CIAM security package, how it works, its benefits, and other relevant information.

Overall, the CIAM Security Package provides a reliable security infrastructure that businesses can leverage to secure customer data and enhance customer experience. It’s a well-rounded solution that addresses the critical aspects of identity management, security, and compliance. Security Package offers a significant solution for comprehensive customer identity management - a secure, reliable, and future-proof answer to all identity management needs.

Any questions? Please, contact the  Value map team!

 

Mónica Domingo

Global Topic Owner - SAP Customer Experience Solutions
